nodes.context: Criminal groups operating within North Macedonia and internationally, involved in drug trafficking, human trafficking, smuggling, corruption, and money laundering.
Organized crime groups from Serbia, collaborators with Macedonian criminal groups.
Organized crime groups from Bulgaria, collaborators with Macedonian criminal groups.
Organized crime groups from Albania, collaborators with Macedonian criminal groups.
Organized crime groups from Italy, cooperating with Macedonian criminal organizations.
Organized crime groups from Russia, cooperating with Macedonian criminal organizations.
Crime group from Veles, involved in the heroin trade in Frankfurt, Germany, and Vienna, Austria.
Criminal group specialized in transporting cocaine from South America to Europe and North Macedonia, involved in murders and revenge killings.
Largest loan shark group in Skopje, with racketeering and drug influences.
Organized crime groups from Montenegro, listed as international links in infobox.
Organized crime groups from Greece, listed as international links in infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: The main collaborators of Macedonian criminal groups are those from neighboring countries, such as the Serbian , Bulgarian , and Albanian mafias .
edges.context: Macedonian criminal groups collaborate with Serbian mafia.
